label: Market Finding
description: An observation describing broader market trends or industry conditions identified through research

label: Research Finding
description: An empirical or field-research result reported by the analyst

label: Product Claim
description: A claim about product features or capabilities (may originate from vendor or analyst verification)

label: Vendor Claim
description: A claim originating primarily from the vendor about their own products or services

label: Analyst Evaluation
description: An evaluative judgment made by Aberdeen analysts about a product

label: Analyst Assertion
description: A declarative statement or position taken by the Aberdeen analyst team

label: Analyst Opinion
description: A forward-looking or qualitative opinion expressed by Aberdeen analysts

label: Analyst Prediction
description: A forward-looking prediction made by Aberdeen analysts

label: Platform Claim
description: A claim about operating system or platform compatibility

label: User Feedback
description: Feedback from end-users or developers reported by Aberdeen field research

label: Deployment Pattern
description: A description of how the product is typically deployed or implemented

label: Service Description
description: A description of consulting

label: Roadmap Claim
description: A vendor claim about future product directions or planned releases

label: Risk Finding
description: An identified risk or cautionary finding related to technology adoption

label: Requirement Finding
description: An identified requirement or prerequisite for successful technology adoption

label: Analyst Recommendation
description: A formal recommendation made by Aberdeen analysts about a product or course of action

label: Vendor Assessment
description: An overall assessment of a vendor's position

label: Positive
description: Observation reflects a positive view of the subject

label: Negative
description: Observation reflects a negative or unfavorable view of the subject

label: Neutral
description: Observation is descriptive or balanced without strong positive or negative valence

label: Cautionary
description: Observation highlights risks

label: Active
description: Organization is currently operating as an independent entity

label: Acquired
description: Organization has been acquired by another company and no longer operates independently

label: Split
description: Organization was divided into two or more separate independent entities

label: Merged
description: Organization merged with another entity and the original entity no longer exists independently

label: Dissolved
description: Organization was formally dissolved and ceased operations

label: Successor Entity
description: An entity that emerged from a split

label: Active
description: Technology is currently in active development and widespread use

label: Legacy
description: Technology is still in use but no longer actively developed or recommended for new projects

label: Largely Obsolete
description: Technology has been largely superseded; only minimal legacy deployments remain

label: Obsolete
description: Technology is no longer in use and no longer commercially available or supported

label: Discontinued
description: Technology was formally discontinued by its vendor

label: White Paper
description: Vendor-sponsored or analyst white paper presenting findings and recommendations

label: Software Development Tools
description: Research domain covering IDEs

label: Industry Analysis
description: Analysis of industry trends

label: Competitive Profiling
description: Detailed assessment of a specific vendor's products and competitive position

label: Field Research
description: Primary research involving interviews or surveys with practitioners and end-users

label: Strategy Classification
description: Categorization of an entity's business strategy or competitive positioning

label: Viability Prediction
description: Expert prediction of entity's long-term survival or market trajectory

label: Actual Outcome
description: Verified historical outcome for an entity or prediction

label: Technology Assessment
description: Evaluation of a technology's maturity, fitness, or competitive positioning

label: Benchmark Result
description: Quantitative performance comparison against peers or industry standards

label: Framework Factor
description: One component of a multi-factor analytical framework

label: Market Data
description: Quantitative market statistic such as revenue, share, or growth rate

label: Expert Opinion
description: Qualitative professional judgment or analytical finding

label: Document Review
description: Analysis of existing documents, reports, and published records

label: Benchmarking
description: Comparison against industry standards, peers, or prior periods

label: Revenue Benchmarking
description: Measurement and comparison of entity revenues against market total

label: High Confidence
description: Strong evidentiary basis; multiple corroborating sources or explicit supplier data

label: Medium Confidence
description: Reasonable basis but data is estimated or partially corroborated

label: Low Confidence
description: Directional judgment with limited evidence; Aberdeen estimate only

label: Verified
description: Confirmed by subsequent events, independent sources, or official records
